novel_features.name: Rate-quote history compare
novel_features.description: Replay persisted rate quotes to answer 'what would carrier B have cost on the labels carrier A actually shipped?' across any date range.

novel_features.name: Batch-error triage
novel_features.description: Lists every batch with unresolved errored sub-shipments, grouped by error reason and aged so you can fix the worst things first.

novel_features.name: Batch-error retry (errored-only)
novel_features.description: Re-process only the errored sub-shipments in a batch, instead of re-running the whole thing.

novel_features.name: Label cost roll-up
novel_features.description: Pivot all labels by carrier / service / weight band with totals, averages, and week-over-week deltas.

novel_features.name: Inventory drift
novel_features.description: Diff ShipStation inventory levels against an external truth file (OMS export, supplier catalog) and print every drifted SKU.

novel_features.name: SKU velocity / stockout risk
novel_features.description: Joins last 30 days of shipped units against current on-hand inventory to compute days-of-cover per SKU and flag stockout risk.

novel_features.name: End-of-day burndown
novel_features.description: Today's shipments with no label, grouped by warehouse and age, so you can clear the floor before pickup.

novel_features.name: Orphan finder
novel_features.description: Find shipments stuck without a label after N hours, plus optionally cross-check an OMS-side external-ID list against ShipStation shipments.
